name: Death Prophet
description: What I've seen goes far beyond death.

25.left: Deaths During Exorcism Extend Duration by +8s

abilities.name: Witchcraft
abilities.description: Grants self bonus movement speed and cooldown reduction. Move Speed Bonus: 0.5%. Cooldown Reduction: 0.75%. Move Speed Bonus Increase: 0.75%. Cooldown Reduction Increase: 0.75%. Spirits per Attack: (1).

abilities.name: Crypt Swarm
abilities.description: Unleashes evil spirit of Exorcism's corresponding level per enemy unit affected. Cast Range: 900. First Radius: 110. Travel Distance: 900. End Radius: 300. Damage: 100/175/250/325. Cooldown: 9/8/7/6 (6.5/5.5/4.5/3.5). Mana Cost: 80/90/100/110.

abilities.name: Silence
abilities.description: Summons an exorcised banshee of its corresponding level per affected enemy unit. Cast Range: 900. Radius: 450 (525). Damage per Instance: 0. Silence Duration: 3.5/4/4.5/5. Cooldown: 15/14/13/12. Mana Cost: 80/90/100/110.

abilities.name: Spirit Siphon
abilities.description: Creates a spirit link between Death Prophet and an enemy unit, draining health from the enemy. Applies a caster-fear if the affected enemy target is siphoned for a certain amount of time consecutively. Increases max charges. Cast Range: 500. Break Distance: 750. Damage per Second: 25/50/75/100 (55/80/105/130). Self Heal per Second: 25/50/75/100 (55/80/105/130). Drain Duration: 6. Fear Duration: (1). Cooldown: 0. Mana Cost: 60.

abilities.name: Exorcism
abilities.description: The banshees' damage is less effective on buildings. These Exorcism spirits released via Death Prophet's attacks or abilities deals additional damage compared to its active cast. Number of Spirits: 10/18/26 (16/24/32). Exorcism Duration: 40. Bonus Duration per Hero Death: (8). Acquisition Radius: 700. Max Radius: 1200. Spirits Move Speed: 525. Cooldown: 150. Mana Cost: 200/300/400.
